notes: Java mocking framework whose name is a maintainer-confirmed pun on mock + mojito; a maintainer answered issue #889 with mock-based /mɑˈkiːtoʊ/ ("mah-KEE-toh"), while creator Szczepan Faber told the mailing list to "go ahead and pronounce it the mojito way" ("moh-KEE-toh"), so the split is genuine.
